summary:
Root cause analysis of x86-64 container loading failures in WinNative. Identifies 5 issues:
1. CRITICAL: Missing proton-9.0-x86_64.txz asset - Wine binary never gets extracted
2. CRITICAL: Box64 launch command uses bare 'wine' command name vs full path
3. MEDIUM: Emulator selection is force-overridden ignoring user settings
4. MEDIUM: extractBox64Files vs extractEmulatorsDlls path split
5. MEDIUM: Container DLL extraction fails silently when Wine path is empty
Includes recommended fixes in priority order.
